title: PBNJ Doggos
description: The mod that adds new dogs to the game PB&J Doggo and PB&SJ Doggo! Go and have new adventures with them!
body:
# NOTICE 
#1 the Collaborator does not do anything yet.

#2 the Peanut butter block you can not walk on it tp's you!

**#3 my pc is haveing hardware trouble he hardware trouble come on june 12 2026 its going to be fixed... on June 20 or June 21 2026 my minecraft mod is going to be worked on June 22 2026 bye! [hi superseth here my minecraft mod was being worked from June first and 11th and then June 12th bye...]**

# BACKSTORY
These doggos came from a mysterious dimension and they seem to be inspired by _italian brainrot_,
It seems to be a case of a dog mergeing with a peanut butter and jelly sandwich but we don't really know so **I** inspire **YOU** to come up with your own backstory

# DOGGO'S DAY
Doggo's Day is on the month of October Specifically
October 11th this year.
October 11th is the first year of the PBNJ Doggos mod.

# NOTE
1. This mod is made by just two devolopers and MCreator.
2. This mod is just for fun.
3. Hope you enjoy!

## Additions


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
Mobs👇

PB&J Doggo [HP: 10 Hearts, ATK: 10 HP]

PB&SJ Doggo [HP: 10 Hearts, ATK: 10 HP, It can be ridden by the player]


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Items👇

PB&J Sandwich [There are two one strawberry and one grape} [Fills whole health bar, can be played as a music disk, can be fed to PB&J Doggo and PB&SJ Doggo to tame and breed]

</details>

## ACTUAL CREATION

**SuperSeth8** used _copilot_ to make it by stitching together a peanut butter and jelly sandwich and a german sheperd to make **PB&J DOGGO!** And then we added it to minecraft simple as that.

# YOUTUBE CHANNEL'S
